creator: tomonori.usaka@ubin.jp
text:
Created attachment 202436
postgresql11-server-llvm.patch

The following two files required to enable LLVM JIT are not installed even though enabling LLVM option.

* /usr/local/lib/postgresql/llvmjit.so
* /usr/local/lib/postgresql/llvmjit_types.bc

See the patch.
